title: Item Pickup Filter
description: Client-side Item Pickup Filter with bypass keybind, whitelist/blocklist modes
body:
![ItemPickupFilter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dev-jcwd/Item-Pickup-Filter/main/BANNER.gif)  

![Fabric Only](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-blue?logo=fabricmc&logoColor=white)
![Client Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client--Side-green)
![MC Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.0%20→%201.21.11-yellow)

[![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Community-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/TubuNkwPam)  

---

**Item Pickup Filter (IPF)** is a lightweight **client-side** mod that gives you full control over what items you pick up in Minecraft.  

No more cluttered inventories — block unwanted items, or allow only the ones you care about!  

---

# ✅ Features
- 🟢 **Whitelist / Blocklist Modes** → Choose whether you only pick up listed items or block them.  
- 🛡️ **Forcefield Illusion (Multiplayer Safe)** → Rejected items are instantly and silently dropped at your feet on servers!
- ⌨️ **Chat-Safe Commands** → Uses `!ipf` instead of `/ipf` so it works flawlessly on any server without triggering "Unknown Command" errors.
- 🔑 **Bypass Keybind** → Temporarily disable filtering while holding your Sneak key.  
- ✨ **Smart Item Formatting** → No need to type `minecraft:`! Just type `dirt` or `cobblestone` and the mod handles the rest.
- 🎛️ **Configurable Feedback** → Silent, message-only, or full chat feedback when pickups are blocked.  
- ⚡ **Quick Toggle** → Enable or disable the entire filter instantly.  
- 💻 **Lightweight & Server-Friendly** → 100% client-side, no server install required.  

---

# 📜 Commands
- **!ipf** → Show help menu  
- **!ipf toggle** → Toggle Item Pickup Filter on/off  
- **!ipf status** → Show current status, mode, and item count  
- **!ipf add <item>** → Add an item to the filter (e.g., `!ipf add dirt`)  
- **!ipf remove <item>** → Remove an item from the filter  
- **!ipf list** → Show all filtered items  
- **!ipf clear** → Clear all filtered items  
- **!ipf mode <whitelist | blocklist>** → Switch filter mode  
- **!ipf feedback <silent | message | full>** → Control feedback style  

---

# 🆕 The 1.21.X Update!
- **Updated to 1.21.0 - 1.21.8!**
- **Improved Multiplayer Handling ("Forcefield Illusion")** → More consistent and reliable item interception on servers.
- **Join Notification** → Sleek message confirming the mod is active when you join a world.
- **Refined Command Menu** → Cleaner, more readable help output with `!ipf`.
- **General Stability Improvements** across all supported versions.

---
